title: Register a corporate agent
description: Register or update the details of an agent acting for a Barbadian company.
summary: Companies can register an agent who will act on their behalf with the Corporate Affairs and Intellectual Property Office.
Use this form to register a new agent, change the details of an existing agent, or update the agent’s address or contact information.

items: the agent number, if you have one
the agent’s name, address, phone number, fax and email
the name and number of the company the agent is acting for

items.name: Letter of authority from the company

how_long: Updates are usually recorded within 5 working days.

options.heading: In person
content: Take the completed Registered Agent Application Form to the Corporate Affairs and Intellectual Property Office at Baobab Tower, Warrens.

contact.agency: Corporate Affairs and Intellectual Property Office (CAIPO)
contact.address:
Baobab Tower, Ground Floor
Warrens
St. Michael
